reviews.review_text: Wonderful location. Dog friendly.

My husband an I stayed in a 1 bedroom cabin , it was spotless,  the water was amazing, we had a lovey
Little
Verander . The owner was so nice , it is the best place to stay.
Staff ok.  Beautiful beach.  Cabin was nice but kitchen utensils not cleaned. They request people to clean after use but obviously previous guests didn't and no one checked.

Absolute beautiful location, well maintained park, peaceful waterfront views, close to covenience shops, super friendly welcoming staff. Excellent abundance of water activities on Burrill Lake. Highly recommended 5*

What a spot. Spectacular views right on the foreshore. Frank was super helpful and responsive and ensured our stay was special. It’s not a huge park and we didn’t feel jammed in which is what made it stand out from the rest. Definitely worth the stop and an easy walk through a beautiful park into town. You won’t be disappointed. Thanks Frank - we recommended our friend Kim to stay there with her beautiful dog Benny … and they absolutely loved it too.

The Nemo van is run down and full of black mould. When bought  to the attention of the manager he spoke down to us and told us we can leave. He tried to brush off that the mould was bad meanwhile every morning me and my family woke up with headaches then after leaving we all developed sore throats and persistent coughing. They offered one nights refund out of the three. When asked for a full refund he spoke so rude towards me very disrespectful and refused to accept the caravan was not fit or clean for purpose. DO NOT BOOK THIS VAN unless you want to get sick. It should be demolished it’s infested with black mould.

Such a terrible owner.
He ruined our experience and I will not be returning again and I don’t recommend anyone else to unless a new owner is put in place. Such a lovely venue unfortunate his presence ruins it. A face only a mother could love
Great little holiday park, stayed five nights on the water with our kayaks. Lots of fun!

My husband went there today and was treated very rudely. He was going to book but decided against it after the man in reception told him he couldn't look around with a dog. Sign says pet friendly what a joke. Not even human friendly.  We did stay there years ago and the ammenites were filthy. Had hoped for some improvement but definitely not. Much better places to stay in Burril lake.

I haven't stayed at this place and will never do, I have just called them to enquiry about a powered site and as soon as I told we would be in a tent the guy said we don't do tent and hung up on me, before giving me the chance to ask for a cabin instead.
Frank is an awesome bloke champion eazy going
Waterfront views in a quiet park.   Clean amenities.  Great place to wind down.
Don’t bother. Very arrogant and rude staff whilst enquiring about availability and price.
Best ever , absolutely loved it
I didn't stay here, but visited the area. The beach/lake is absolutely divine. A fave spot for our family. Plenty of parking, great grassy area for picnic and lots of benches for sitting.

My Husband and I Stayed on a powered site for a week it was the most amazing Caravan Park Great Location Beautiful Park Well Maintained and Frank was Great We will be back every year We loved It Thankyou Frank

Traumhaft schöne Lage, Cabin mit viel Liebe zum Detail und viel Cachet eingerichtet. Küche gut ausgestattet, BBQ neben dem Cabin. Sehr sauber. Guter Spot zum schwimmen und spaziern. Sehr freundlicher Bezitzer!

What a little slice of paradise!  Frank the manager owner was such a lovely man and so very helpful following a bad experience at previous accommodation.  The cabin was spotlessly clean and right on the water with magnificent views.  Nothing to fault other then maybe need a couple more tea towels.  We will definitely be back.

What a great spot. Lovely clean park, cabin on the waterfront was divine. Tidy little cabin and comfy beds. Spa bath was heaven. We stayed 2 weeks and wished we had more time. Shops close by, Ulladulla up the road, numerous places to explore. Frank was amazing. What a nice  guy and so very helpful. Saw whales and some beautiful sun rises. We will be back.
For a super chill or quiet place to stay
The owner is a top Aussie bloje very clean everything u need loving my stay

Was asked for my card on arrive as a bond incase cabin was left dirty, was not allowed to park next to cabin, was told to park behind quickly unpack and then move car to designated parking spot. ( had my elderly mum with me how has rheumatoid arthritis ) so was hoping to drop her close to the cabin door. There was sand in the beds, blood on the pillow cases and marks on the doona cover. Frank the owner wasn’t  very welcoming and was told to have the washing up done before leaving and if I choose to use the dish washer then to leave enough time to have it emptied and packed away in the right cupboards. Was offered no discount for the way the cabin was. Lesson learnt an will never return there.
Sand in bed, blood on pillows, springs sticking out of mattress.  If you are thinking of staying with your pets go somewhere else.

We absolutely loved staying here and would have asked to extend our stay if we didn't have to mind grandkids the following day.
We were made to feel very welcome by the owner on arrival. He even called by to check everything was to our satisfaction, and also called in on our last day to thank us for staying.
We have stayed in all three parks in the surrounding area and  we would definitely recommend Dolphin Point over the others.
We will definitely be back.
Riding the current from the beach to the park was the highlight

Amazing place!!
The owner (Frank) is really nice and helped us with everything ☺️
Facilities are clean and nice, plenty of activities for kids and the place is just beautiful!
Thanks Frank for a great stay! Beautiful cabins right on the water. So quiet and relaxing.
Beautiful cabin s right on waterfront, shallow lagoon for swimming  surf beach a few minutes walk

Very overpriced & underwhelming stay in dated, unmaintained & poorly cleaned cabin. Dirty windows, filthy oven, dirty marks on walls, mouldy curtains, spiderwebs & dead spiders around down lights. Had to sign a bond form & told to leave everything where it was & if using dishwasher on last day make sure it is emptied before leaving. Manager said we don’t want riff raff in the park, but we looked like we’d be ok ? No BBQ on deck due to an incident, so small bbq in place on grass in front of cabin.|Cabin was however well positioned with beautiful view over water & park is very well maintained with lots of grass.

Right on the water - 30 seconds and you’re in.  Great swimming and snorkeling to be had along the entrance to Burril Lake.  Very well kept and clean park that’s well managed.  We’ve already rebooked for next year.

Perfect location for families with children
Not as homely as it was with the older gentleman as owner

Had our brand new landcruiser stolen from the park and burnt out the next reserve over.
The caravan park has no security, no cameras (although there are signs saying there are) and no fences on the northern border of the park, directly across from the reserve where my car was found burnt. According to locals, that reserve is well known to have free camping and a high turnover of transient people.
Owner became aggressive when I enquired about his insurance.

Absolutely outstanding location and accommodation. Our dog loved this location and every guest and fellow dog owners were so welcoming. Will definitely be back .Nothing beats a waterfront cabin ❤️ and the shower was incredible.
Frank it was a pleasure meeting you and cannot wait to re book again .
Regards leanne&Pete Savio
Friendly staff, best views, and calm waters for kids to play.

Just spent 5 nights on a waterfront site with 2 friends on site next to us. Easy access to site and no problems setting up our vans. Manager was wonderful. Facilities were always clean and tidy. Great small caravan park in a great location. Loved it.

Hi Corey this is Frank the owner responding.
Firstly your suggestion that the sheets are not changed between guest visits is a ridiculous statement and very offensive.
As explained to you on your last visit we use a linen service (the largest provider in NSW). Occasionally there is the odd mark or blemish on the linen they deliver. This is does not mean the linen has not been cleaned.
Everyone is entitled to their opinion Corey but when sour grapes motivate these incorrect statements it’s poor form on your side.
Corey if it was so bad for you here why did you come back 3 years in a row ???
And why did you want to book a 4 year?? You know why you weren’t welcome back as we discussed it at the time.
So perhaps we should just leave it at that.
Regards
Frank
